name: DebtBlasters
description_short: Nevada-based bankruptcy filing service offering Chapter 7 personal bankruptcy assistance online for $795 in legal fees through Atkinson Law Firm.
description_long:
DebtBlasters is an online bankruptcy filing service operated by Atkinson Law Firm, positioned as a low-cost alternative for Nevada residents seeking Chapter 7 personal bankruptcy relief. The service launched with a focus on making bankruptcy accessible through digital channels rather than requiring in-person consultations. Their primary value proposition centers on affordability and convenience, targeting consumers who qualify for Chapter 7 protection but seek streamlined, budget-friendly filing support.

The company offers Chapter 7 personal bankruptcy filing completed entirely online or through a mobile app. Their core service includes legal representation and document preparation for Chapter 7 cases at a flat rate of $795 in legal fees. They provide an eligibility checker tool to help prospective clients understand whether they qualify for Chapter 7 bankruptcy protection. Payment plans are available to accommodate clients unable to pay the full fee upfront. All services require that clients be Nevada residents—a geographic limitation that restricts their market significantly.

DebtBlasters distinguishes itself primarily through pricing and delivery model. The $795 flat fee is positioned as the "LOWEST PRICE" for Las Vegas bankruptcy legal services, emphasizing cost-consciousness. The "Bankruptcy Made Easy™" branded approach highlights the online/app-based filing process as more convenient than traditional law office visits. However, the company provides minimal detail about attorney qualifications, case outcomes, or post-filing support beyond the initial filing service.

While low cost is attractive, potential clients should recognize important limitations. The website contains minimal information about what the $795 fee covers, whether it includes all required court filings, what happens if complications arise, or the level of attorney availability during the case. No information is provided about success rates, client reviews, or long-term outcomes. For consumers in Nevada facing Chapter 7 bankruptcy, this service may offer affordable basic filing support, but the limited transparency makes it difficult to assess whether the low price reflects genuine efficiency or potential gaps in service quality.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Flat $795 legal fee for Chapter 7 filing—significantly below typical bankruptcy attorney rates of $1,500-$3,500
Online/app-based filing allows completion from home without required office visits
Payment plans available for clients unable to pay full fee upfront
Free eligibility checker tool to screen whether Chapter 7 qualification is likely
Operated by established Atkinson Law Firm, providing attorney backing for filings
Streamlined digital process reduces time investment for busy consumers
Clear geographic targeting (Nevada residents) indicates local legal expertise
cons: Severe geographic limitation—Nevada residents only, excluding all other states
Website provides almost no detail on scope of services, post-filing support, or what happens if complications arise
No client testimonials, success rates, or case outcome data provided
Unclear whether $795 covers all required documents, court filings, and miscellaneous bankruptcy costs
Minimal information about attorney qualifications, experience level, or availability during the case process
best_for: Nevada residents with straightforward Chapter 7 bankruptcy cases seeking the lowest-cost filing option
Individuals with limited funds who cannot afford traditional bankruptcy attorney fees ($1,500+)
Tech-comfortable consumers preferring online/app-based legal processes over in-person consultations
Debtors with uncomplicated finances and few assets or creditors to manage in bankruptcy
diagnosis: DebtBlasters is best for Nevada residents with straightforward finances who prioritize cost minimization in Chapter 7 bankruptcy filing and are comfortable with a digital-first, minimal-contact service model. The primary caveat is the lack of transparency about service scope, attorney availability, and whether complications are adequately covered under the $795 flat fee—making it unsuitable for complex bankruptcy situations or risk-averse consumers.
services: Payment plan options for legal fees
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 376 E Warm Springs Rd #130, Las Vegas, NV 89119
